entry.title: New: Bill 137 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS SECTION 25-8-22 (PUNA DISTRICT ZONE MAP), ARTICLE 8, CHAPTER 25 (ZONING CODE) OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), BY CHANGING THE DISTRICT CLASSIFICATION FROM AGRICULTURAL – 20 ACRES (A-20a) TO FAMILY AGRICULTURAL

Latest action: Council: Bill 137 passes second & final reading - 04/22/26

View on the council site
